name: Pineapple Boats Ahoy
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil.
2. Add shrimp; return to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 3 to 5 minutes. Drain shrimp well and rinse with cold water. Chill.
4. Peel and devein the shrimp; set aside.
5. Cut pineapple in half lengthwise. Scoop out the pulp, leaving shells about 1/2 to 1/4 inch thick. Cut the pineapple pulp into bite-size pieces and discard the core. Set aside 1 cup of pineapple pieces; reserve the remaining pieces for other recipes.
6. Peel, seed, and section the orange and grapefruit. Combine the fruit sections with 1 cup of pineapple pieces and shrimp. Cover and chill until ready to serve.
7. Before serving, peel and dice the avocado. Sprinkle with lime juice to prevent discoloration. Combine the avocado and shrimp mixture; spoon into the reserved pineapple shells.
8. Pour dressing over top before serving.
Dressing:
Combine all ingredients in a container of an electric blender. Blend well. Yield: 3/4 cup.
